<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Imatinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Imatinib Teva is indicated for the treatment of  Adult and paediatric patients with newly diagnosed Philadelphia chromosome (bcr?abl) positive (Ph+) chronic myeloid leukaemia (CML) for whom bone...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L2</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans（100.0%）</li>
<li>heart fibrosarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>fibroblastic neoplasm（99.9%）</li>
<li>conventional fibrosarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>kidney fibrosarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>low grade fibromyxoid sarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>liposarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>liver fibrosarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>autosomal recessive familial Mediterranean fever（99.9%）</li>
<li>ovarian myxoid liposarcoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>familial rhabdoid tumor（99.8%）</li>
<li>benign PEComa（99.8%）</li>
<li>uterine corpus perivascular epithelioid cell tumor（99.8%）</li>
<li>lymphangiomyoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>lymphangioleiomyomatosis（99.8%）</li>
<li>bone fibrosarcoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>cutaneous undifferentiated pleomorphic sarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>cutaneous leiomyosarcoma (disease)（99.7%）</li>
<li>central nervous system fibrosarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>vulva sarcoma（99.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
